data.title: CryptoQuant: Bitcoin miners’ revenue drops to near two-month low, but selling pressure remains
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin miners' income has fallen to the lowest level since April, with daily earnings falling to $34 million. However, despite the decline in profitability, there is no sign of forced selling as miners' wallet outflows remain low. In addition, Bitcoin mining companies' reserves are also increasing, indicating a long-term strategy in the current low-price environment. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bitcoin Miners' Revenue Hits Lowest Level Since April
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin miners have seen their revenue drop to the lowest level since April, with daily earnings falling to $34 million. Despite the decline in profitability, there are no signs of forced selling as miner wallet outflows remain low. Additionally, Bitcoin mining companies are increasing their reserves, indicating a long-term strategy in the current low-price environment.

data.title: Calamos Launches Three Bitcoin ETFs to Provide Downside Protection for Investors
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Asset management company Calamos announced the launch of three Bitcoin exchange-traded funds, aiming to provide investors with downside protection exposure, namely: Calamos Bitcoin Structured Alt Protection ETF, Calamos Bitcoin 90 Series Structured Alt Protection ETF and Calamos Bitcoin 80 Series Structured Alt Protection ETF. These three ETFs intend to invest in US stock benchmark indices and Bitcoin, and are expected to start trading on July 8. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Musk: Grok 4 to be released after July 4
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk posted on the X platform that he and the xAI team have been working all night to improve Grok, and the progress is going smoothly. Grok 4 is expected to be released after July 4, and another large-scale run is needed to build a specialized encoding model.

data.title: Coatue Founder: Bitcoin Market Value to Reach $5 Trillion by 2030
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Philippe Laffont, founder of Coatue Management, predicts that the market value of Bitcoin will reach 5 trillion US dollars by 2030, up 134% from the current 2.1 trillion US dollars. Laffont included Bitcoin in his "Top 40" investment list, alongside technology giants such as Microsoft and Nvidia. He believes that the proportion of Bitcoin in global total assets should increase from the current 0.5% to 1%-2%, and pointed out that Bitcoin's volatility is declining and may benefit from the global "de-dollarization" trend. (Cailian News)

data.title: Binance Wallet will launch NodeOps (NODE) ​​exclusive TGE on June 30
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance Wallet will launch NodeOps (NODE) ​​exclusive TGE on June 30. The subscription time is from 4 pm to 6 pm on June 30, 2025. Eligible users need to use Binance Alpha points to participate in the subscription. In addition, 27,153,349 NODE tokens will be used for future activities, and the specific details will be announced separately. TGE details and event page will be released soon.

data.title: Bitcoin Long-Term Holders Record Historic Monthly Increase
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from CryptoQuant reveals that Bitcoin long-term holders have increased their holdings by 800,000 BTC over the past 30 days, marking the highest monthly increase on record. This significant accumulation has only occurred six times before, including in July 2021 and September 2024, both of which were followed by substantial price surges. The cost basis for long-term holders is concentrated between $95,000 and $107,000, while short-term holders have an average cost of $93,000.

There is a noticeable divergence in Bitcoin holding patterns, with long-term holders now accounting for 68% of the circulating supply. Miners from the "Satoshi era" have sold only 150 BTC in 2025, indicating a strong reluctance to sell.

data.description: 币安在 X 上宣布，币安钱包将上线 NodeOps (NODE) TGE 活动，认购时间 2025 年 6 月 30 日 16:00-18:00 (UTC+8)，符合资格的用户须使用币安 Alpha 积分参与。

data.title: French listed company Crypto Blockchain will implement a loan of up to 20 million euros for the purchase of Bitcoin and mining equipment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News French listed company Crypto Blockchain Industries announced that it will implement a non-dilutive shareholder loan of up to 20 million euros (about 23.4 million US dollars), and the proceeds will be used to purchase Bitcoin and mining equipment.

data.title: South Korean retail investors have poured nearly $450 million into Circle stock this month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Circle Internet Group (CRCL) has become the most popular overseas stock among Korean retail investors in June, with a cumulative purchase amount of US$450 million. The company's stock price has soared by more than 500% since its listing on June 5, and its market value has exceeded US$77 billion, exceeding the total market value of its issued stablecoin USDC (US$61 billion). This phenomenon stems from South Korean President Lee Jae-myung's accelerated promotion of the legalization reform of the Korean won stablecoin, and the stock price of local financial technology company KakaoPay rose by 160% during the same period. (CoinDesk)

data.title: “Going Vertical”: Coinbase Closes at Record High Despite Analyst Uncertainty
data.description:
Coinbase ended Thursday's trading session at a new all-time closing high of $369. 21, sparking excitement among investors and mixed reactions from analysts.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/going-vertical-coinbase-closes-at-record-high-amid-analyst-uncertainty/

data.title: HashDit Warns of Compromised PANewsCN X Account
data.description: The Web3 security firm HashDit stated on X, “We have noticed that the @PANewsCN X account has been compromised. Please do not interact or trust any of the links from the tweets right now, until it has been resolved.” Users are advised to remain cautious and avoid engaging with any content from the affected account until further notice.

data.title: Binance reduces withdrawal fee to 20 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance officials stated on the X platform that the Binance redemption fee has been reduced to 20 USDT.

data.title: Ethereum set for rally as it holds above crucial $2.4K price: Analyst
data.description:
Crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe says Ether could be “testing the other side of the range” in the coming weeks as it trades above $2,400.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ether-price-rally-speculation-crucial-level-holds-crypto-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) Top 3 Gainers of the Week: GOR, CSTAR, USDUC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) recently launched projects showing an upward trend. Among them, GOR has the highest increase of 558.5% after its launch, CSTAR has reached 292.1%, and USDUC has reached 173.1%.
Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX, providing users with a more convenient, efficient and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use Bitget spot accounts (USDT/USDC) to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.title: Analysis: ETH may rebound if it stabilizes above $2,400
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Analyst Michaël van de Poppe pointed out that if ETH can maintain above the key $2,400 support, it may "test the upper edge of the range" in the next few weeks and start a rebound. The current price of ETH is $2,452, down 7.45% from 30 days ago. Glassnode data shows that on June 16, whales bought 1 million ETH in a single day, the largest purchase since 2018. The spot Ethereum ETF also recorded net inflows for three consecutive days, totaling $232 million.

data.description:
